### Proposal

Describe the idea or concept. This can be early-stage, experimental, or open-ended.

### Motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? Why might this idea be valuable?

### Considerations

List any possible concerns, trade-offs, or related ideas.

- 
- 
- 

### Request for Comments

This proposal is open for discussion and feedback.

### References

(Optional) Link to related issues, discussions, articles, or prior art.
